task_completion.description: Verify the required output directory structure is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing the directory `/home/ga/Music/album_output/` containing two subdirectories: `tracks/` and `thumbnails/`.

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 MP3 audio tracks are generated in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for exactly 5 files named `track_01.mp3` through `track_05.mp3` located inside the `/home/ga/Music/album_output/tracks/` directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 PNG thumbnails are generated in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for exactly 5 files named `thumb_01.png` through `thumb_05.png` located inside the `/home/ga/Music/album_output/thumbnails/` directory. File manager previews or image viewer windows should show actual frames from a concert video.

task_completion.description: Verify the Album and Track Number ID3 metadata is embedded in the MP3 files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output (e.g., using `ffprobe`, `exiftool`, `id3v2`) or GUI file properties/media player showing that the Album is set to 'Venue Showcase 2024' and the Track numbers are correctly set (1 through 5) for the generated MP3 files.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title and Artist ID3 metadata is embedded correctly for each MP3 file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output or GUI file properties showing the specific Title and Artist for the tracks (e.g., Track 1 Title: 'Opening Waves', Artist: 'Marina Cortez') matching the setlist.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually processed the source video to extract audio and images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of media processing commands (like `ffmpeg` in the terminal) or GUI media editors (like Audacity, Kdenlive, or VLC) actively processing `/home/ga/Videos/venue_showcase_2024.mp4`.

integrity.description: Verify the generated files are genuine media files and not empty or fake files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check file sizes in the terminal (`ls -l`) or file manager. The `.mp3` and `.png` files should have realistic sizes (greater than a few kilobytes, not 0 bytes). Thumbnails should display actual image previews.

integrity.description: Verify metadata was embedded into the files, not just written as text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the metadata is shown as part of the MP3 file properties or via a metadata reading tool, rather than just being typed into a standalone text document or script without being executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Album: 'Venue Showcase 2024'. Track 1: Title 'Opening Waves', Artist 'Marina Cortez' (duration ~20s). Track 2: Title 'Neon Drift', Artist 'The Parallax' (duration ~22s). Track 3: Title 'Quiet Thunder', Artist 'Aisha Ren' (duration ~22s). Track 4: Title 'Binary Sunset', Artist 'Codec Nine' (duration ~22s). Track 5: Title 'Last Light', Artist 'Elena Voss' (duration ~22s).
